snippet.title: @SaiAbhyankkar - Pavazha Malli (Music Video) | Kayadu | Shruti Haasan | Vivek | Thejo | Think Indie
snippet.description:
Here's the Music Video of "Pavazha Malli", Sung by @SaiAbhyankkar & Shruti Haasan, Lyrics Written by Vivek, Music Composed by @SaiAbhyankkar

Song Credits:

Song Name : Pavazha Malli 
Composed, Sung & Produced  : @SaiAbhyankkar 
Singers : @SaiAbhyankkar, Shruti Haasan 
Lyrics : Vivek 
Additional Vocals : Sanjana Kalmanje, Vaimu, Arjun, Elisa ,Shiva 
Synth & Keys : @SaiAbhyankkar   
Rhythm Produced by @SaiAbhyankkar 
Ethnic Percussions : @SaiAbhyankkar 
Kumbaaara Rhythms : Yanka Percussion Group  
Choir : The Indian Choral Ensemble (Chamber) 
Singers : Sushmita Narasimhan, Aparna Harikumar, Sivaranjini Chandramouli, Bavathayini Nagarajan, Sudharsan Hemaram, Shibi Srinivasan, Manikandan Chembai 
Choir Directors:  Kalyani Nair, Karthik Manickavasakam  
Chorus Recorded at 2BarQ Studios by Rajesh kannan 
Bass : Derick Mcarthur, Keba Jeremiah 
Accoustic & Electric Guitars : Keba Jeremiah 
Additional Rhythm : Kalyan 
Additional Guitar : Godfray Immanuel  
Tavil : Prasanth, Saravanan  
Nadaswaram : Parthiban 
Flute : Lalith Talluri 
Saxophone : Basanth Muralikrishnan 
Violin : Sivateja Mallajosyula 
Traditional Stringed Instruments : Tapas Roy

snippet.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep Ohlan‚Äôs allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival. While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages ‚Äď including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal ‚Äď The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video‚Äôs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures ‚Äď Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Dhurandhar 2 Trailer Pre-REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Dhurandhar 2 Trailer Pre-Review By Deeksha Sharma. Ranveer Singh in Dhurandhar The Revenge Part 2 Directed by Aditya Dhar is the Most awaited Sequel to Dhurandhar 2025 Bollywood movie with Neve seen before Box Office Collection & Akshaye Khanna presentation. Dhurandhar 2 The Revenge Trailer Announcement silences the Clash with Yash Toxic movie as Dhurandhar 2 is set for 19 March release with the Most awaited Trailer of 2026. Dhurandhar 2 Trailer Surprise Cameos & Old New Characters with Bade Sahab Introduction- Full Movie discussion inside. Can Dhurandhar 2 Become the No.1 Indian Film of All Time? Do leave Comments below!

#Dhurandhar2 #Dhurandhar2Trailer #DhurandharTheRevenge

snippet.title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
ARMY - ARE YOU READY?! Let the countdown begin, pop royalty is back!

BTS members RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook reunite on the global stage for the first time to celebrate the release of their new album, Arirang. Catch the historic performance LIVE worldwide from Korea, only on Netflix.

BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG. March 21 8PM KST / 7AM ET / 4AM PT.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82157128

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world‚Äôs leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | WILDCARD | Day 1
snippet.description:
The WILDCARD stage is live.

Teams now battle for one final opportunity to secure their place in the SEMI FINALS. The margin for error is gone and every match carries serious weight.

Only the top 8 teams from this stage will move forward.

One more chance. One more fight. Everything on the line.

Watch the WILDCARD live and see who earns their spot in the SEMI FINALS.

ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri

Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri

Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri

snippet.title: #RńÄKńÄSńÄ Teaser | Sangeeth Shobhan & Nayan Sarika | Manasa Sharma | Niharika Konidela | Zee Studios
snippet.description:
Watch the official #RaakaasaaTeaser now! A fantasy-comedy starring Sangeeth Shobhan & Nayan Sarika. #RńĀkńĀsńĀ In Cinemas April 3, 2026 ūüí•
‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶
Rakasa (formerly #PEP2) is a fantasy-comedy film from Pink Elephant Pictures, produced by Niharika Konidela and Zee Studios, directed by Manasa Sharma. Blending imaginative fantasy with engaging humour for audiences of all ages.

Featuring a fresh and exciting pairing of Sangeeth Shobhan and Nayan Sarika in the lead roles, Vennela Kishore, Brahmaji, Tanikella Bharani, Ashish Vidyarthi, Getup Srinu, Sukhwinder Singh, Anoop Singh, Vasu Inturi, Rohini, Rohan Roy.

snippet.title: Holi Khele Masane Mein | Malini Awasthi | Latest Holi Songs | Holi Ke Gane | Holi 2026
snippet.description:
"Holi Khele Masane Mein" a folk Holi Song sung by the renowned folk singer Malini Awasthi. Rooted in traditional Indian folk music, this unique Holi special is dedicated to Lord Shiva. It depicts the divine and mystical Holi played by Mahadev in the cremation grounds, where colors are replaced with sacred ash and bhasm.

Unlike conventional Holi party songs, this devotional Holi bhajan reflects the spiritual and intense form of Shiva ‚ÄĒ the ascetic, the destroyer, and the eternal yogi. Through powerful vocals and authentic folk composition, this song beautifully portrays the imagery of Bhasm Holi, spiritual detachment, and divine celebration beyond worldly colors.

If you are searching for Shiv Holi song, Malini Awasthi song, devotional Holi songs, Mahadev bhajan, or Shiv bhakti song, this track is a must-add to your playlist. Perfect for Maha Shivratri, Holi celebrations, bhajan sandhya, and devotional gatherings.

Experience a different shade of Holi ‚ÄĒ one of devotion, vairagya, and divine energy.

#HoliSong #ShivHoli #MaliniAwasthi #Mahadev #BholeNath #DevotionalSongs #FolkHoli #ShivBhajan #HoliSpecial #holikhelemasanemein #holikhelemasanemeinsong #masanekiholi

snippet.title: VALETI DAARU - IKKA - NEHA KAKKAR | PHENOM | LATEST SONG 2026 | BHUSHAN KUMAR
snippet.description:
The heat is on. Get ready to turn it up with this explosive new banger. Presenting the Official Video Song ‚ÄúValeti Daaru‚ÄĚ by IKKA x Neha Kakkar.

Gulshan Kumar & T-Series Present
Bhushan Kumar's "VALETI DAARU"

Credits:
Music - IKKA
Lyrics - IKKA 
Singer - IKKA , Neha Kakkar
Music Arranged By - Phenom 
Mix and Master - Ashock
Rebab player - Amar Sangam 
Phenom stylist - Power
Music Label - T-Series

Video Credits:
Production House: BLVCKHOLE MEDIA
Directed by Inflict
DOP: Atharva Patil 
Producer: Akshat Bhargava
DA/Chief AD: Sarthak Gorla
1st AD: Aashish Gelal
1st AC: Nain Haque  
Line Producer: Sumit Dubey
Head of Production: Harshit Bakshi 
UPM: Rohit Dubey

Prod. Designer: Vishal Pandey 
Art direction team: Vishal pandey and team

Choreography: Serene Subarno & Mohit Yadav 
Dancers: Deepali, Yukta, ‚Ā†Ishika, ‚Ā†Manasvi, ‚Ā†Rani, ‚Ā†Suhani, ‚Ā†Yashika, ‚Ā†Alina, Tisha, ‚Ā†Arti
Costume Stylist: Prabhjot Kaur 
Assistant Stylist: Ritika Kapoor, Muskan Gupta
Dressman: Riaz & Team
Gaffer: Saifi
HMU: Rohit Diwaker & Team
VFX: Prathmesh

Location: Raja Nahar Singh Haveli
Jimmy Jib: Rajeev
BTS: Mayank Goswami
Accounts: Mayank

#ValetiDaaru #IKKA #NehaKakkar

Lyrics:
Husn tera saaki saaki
Big booty babe sunti hai Taki Taki
Yo, bohot teekhi like wasabi, haanji
Tu seene pe gire jaise kamikaze
Mujhse zyada tere peeche paparazzi
I wanna get tipsy, so more glasses
Aankhein teri jaana meri jaan ki pyaasi
Put your drinks up, 'cause we came to party

Main suit payeya kaale rang da, kaale rang da
Bazaar 'ch chann koi chaddoon
Panjeba chann chann kardi, chann chann kardi
Jab chaloon toh bande maroon

Nain naini lake varge, lake varge
Paani mein kise utaaron
Figure kartoos jatti da, barood jatti da
Husn Valeti Daaru

Tu aafat hai, tu aafat hai
Lachke toh kaala naag lage
Taapmaan badh jaata hai
Jab tu naache toh aag lage

Teri kamli jawani ka na tod
Jo bhi kar rahi tu kar baby aur
The way you go down laga ke poora zor
Tod degi lagta club ka floor

Don‚Äôt hurt nobody when you move that thing
Ka se kamariya jab DJ kare spin
Cha se chamakta paseena on the skin
Ga se gatak gayi pauni bottle, tu gin

Fa se tu phasa phasa dress daale hai
Ha se hawa mein khule baal kaale hai
Ra se rangeele hum mizaaj waale hai
Baaki sab basic, hum naam waale hain

Main suit payeya kaale rang da, kaale rang da
Bazaar 'ch chann koi chaddoon
Panjeba chann chann kardi, chann chann kardi
Jab chaloon toh bande maroon

Nain naini lake varge, lake varge
Paani mein kise utaaron
Figure kartoos jatti da, barood jatti da
Husn Valeti Daaru

Move that thing, move that thing
Poori raat jaane jaana meri, loop that thing
Na khatron se khelo, hoga tera nuksaan
Zara bachke rehna if I lose that thing

Maneya karo, maneya karo
Galliyan beganiyan na langeya karo
Jithon langaan main karwaan
La la la la chaaron paas

Na jatti de aase paas
Koi bhool that thing

Go shorty, it's your birthday
Celebrate hoga tera birthday poore hafte
Opps ko hum pack kara ke bhejte baste
Rappers saare chalte, kare badle unke raste

Tu jaan leti hans ke
Bahar tu mere bas ke
Kash lamba khincha tu aane lagge dhas ke
Raat ruk jao, woh dene lagi kasmein

Pyaar se woh kehti mujhe
Daddy ji, namaste

Main suit payeya kaale rang da, kaale rang da
Bazaar 'ch chann koi chaddoon
Panjeba chann chann kardi, chann chann kardi
Jab chaloon toh bande maroon

Nain naini lake varge, lake varge
Paani mein kise utaaron
Figure kartoos jatti da, barood jatti da
Husn Valeti Daaru

Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei

Koi Radua Maare Siti

Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du

Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

teri murli ki dhun sunne ,
me marsane se aayi hu.
me barsane se aayi hu,
me vrishbhan ki jai hu.
are rasiya o man vasiya ,
me etni dur se aayi hu.

suna hai shyam manmohan,
ke makhan khub churate ho.
tumhe makhan khilane ko,
me matki sath layi hu .
teri murli ki dhun sunne ,
me marsane se aayi hu.

suna hai shyam manmohan ,
ke goa khub charate ho .
tere goa charane ko,
me gwale sath layi hu.
teri murli ki dhun sunne ,
me marsane se aayi hu.

suna hai shyam manmohan,
ke krupa khub karte ho.
teri krupa me pane ko ,
tere darbar aayi hu.
teri murli ki dhun sunne ,

teri murli ki dhun sunne ,
me marsane se aayi hu.
me barsane se aayi hu,
me vrishbhan ki jai hu.
are rasiya o man vasiya ,
me etni dur se aayi hu.

suna hai shyam manmohan,
ke makhan khub churate ho.
tumhe makhan khilane ko,
me matki sath layi hu .
teri murli ki dhun sunne ,
me marsane se aayi hu.

suna hai shyam manmohan ,
ke goa khub charate ho .
tere goa charane ko,
me gwale sath layi hu.
teri murli ki dhun sunne ,
me marsane se aayi hu.

suna hai shyam manmohan,
ke krupa khub karte ho.
teri krupa me pane ko ,
tere darbar aayi hu.
teri murli ki dhun sunne ,

snippet.title: De Daru De Daru | Karma (1986) | Kishore Kumar, Manhar Udhas | Jackie Shroff, Anil Kapoor
snippet.description:
Song Details :
Star Cast : Dilip Kumar, Nutan, Naseeruddin Shah, Jackie Shroff, Anil Kapoor, Anupam Kher, Sridevi, Poonam Dhillon
Singers : Kishore Kumar, Mahendra Kapoor, Manhar Udhas
Music Director :  Laxmikant Pyarelal
Lyrics by: Anand Bakshi
Producer & Director: Subhash Ghai

Lyrics:

De Daru, De Daru, O Mere Bhaiya De Daru
Saavan ka mast mahina hain
Saavan ka mast mahina hain
Kyaa saagar hain kyaa minaa hain
Ye peena bhi koi peena hain
Peena hain peena hain
Peena hain to munh se lagaakar
Botal peene de daaru
De  dada o mere bhaiya re de daaru
De daaru botal se peene de daaru
Are bade dinon ke
Baad mili hain ye daaru
Are hosh rahe na
Baaki saaqi de daaru
O mere bhaiya de daaru

Ye andar baahar hone do
Hamen hansane do hamen rone do
Sab bhed karam khul jaa enge
Sab bhed karam khul jaa enge
Sab kante pe tul jaa enge
Ham bure sahi par achchhe hain
Kyonki ham dil ke sachche hain
Are jooth kahen to jaan hamaari
Le daaru o mere bhaiya de daaru

One peg two peg three peg four peg
Ham peg pikar hosh mein aae hain
Haan ab ham josh mein aae hain
Paani mein aag milaai hain
Kuchh garmi khuun mein aayi hain
Masti sar chadhake bolegi
Ab gori ghuunghat kholegi
Wo haath kisi ke pade nahin
Hum bade dinon se lade nahin
Are aaj kisi ko maarenge de daaru
Are detaa jaa daaru re
O mere bhaiya de daaru.
